description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of light wood cladding and large glass windows. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, including a main living area with exposed beams, a gabled roof section, and a flat-roofed extension. Outdoor living spaces are integrated, with a spacious patio furnished with lounge chairs, a dining set, and a hot tub. The windows are generously sized, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The rooflines are a mix of gable and flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style. The overall layout is open and airy, with visible interior partitions and modern furnishings.
description: A modern house with light wood cladding, large glass windows, and a mix of gabled and flat roofs, featuring spacious patios and open interior spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gabled section, large windows, and patio with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open living area, exposed beams, and patio with lounge chairs and hot tub.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the flat-roofed extension, large sliding glass doors, and outdoor dining area.
description_view_3: Back view with minimal windows, wood cladding, and a clear view of the building's geometric layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, minimal steps, and no porch, emphasizing clean lines and simplicity.
